<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Simulation>
  <TimeStep>1e-4</TimeStep>
  <OutputFrequency>100</OutputFrequency>
  <BoundaryConditions>
    <DBC type="Wall" x="0" y="0" z="0" xSize="0.9" ySize="0.062" zSize="0.508"/>
    <DBC type="Wall" x="0.9" y="0" z="0" xSize="0.9" ySize="0.062" zSize="0.508"/>
    <DBC type="Wall" x="0" y="0.062" z="0" xSize="0.9" ySize="0.062" zSize="0.508"/>
    <DBC type="Wall" x="0" y="0" z="0.508" xSize="0.9" ySize="0.062" zSize="0.508"/>
  </BoundaryConditions>
  <Particles>
    <Diameter>0.002</Diameter>
    <InitialConditions>
      <WaterVolume>0.9*0.062*0.508*0.18</WaterVolume>
      <WaterHeight>0.508*0.18</WaterHeight>
    </InitialConditions>
  </Particles>
  <Sensors>
    <Sensor id="1" type="Pressure" position="0.45 0.031 0.254" frequency="10"/>
  </Sensors>
</Simulation>
